title: San Francisco Crime Data Analysis and Trends Dashboard

description: An interactive data visualization project analyzing over 900,000 police incident reports from San Francisco (2018-Present) using Python for data processing and Tableau for visualization.

title: San Francisco Airport Tableau Dashboard
author: @ashhh-22
description: Interactive Tableau dashboard visualizing flight patterns and route statistics for San Francisco International Airport (SFO).

title: BikeShare Visualization
author: @se7ven7-7
description: Tableau Public data storytelling project analyzing San Francisco Bikeshare trips. Explores ride duration, popular routes, and user behavior patterns using interactive dashboards.

author: @Shrushti72
description: This project analyzes employee salary data from San Francisco between 2011-2018. Includes data cleaning, exploratory analysis, visualizations, and Power BI dashboard.

description: Tableau dashboard for visualizing San Francisco crime data, identifying regional trends and hot spots with interactive filtering and geo-mapping.

title: SCI MET
author: @chasenunez
description: A browser-based, interactive dashboard for visualizing researcher output profiles using principles from the San Francisco Declaration on Research Assessment (DORA).

title: Crime Data Analysis PowerBI
author: @deeksha25022004
description: A Power BI dashboard visualizing 12-month crime forecasts across San Francisco police districts. It enables interactive comparison through trend lines, bar charts, and district-level filters using pre-processed forecast data.

description: An open-source spatial index of displaced cultural artifacts

description: An interactive dashboard showcasing the California budget, built using Claude Code

author: Unknown
description: A paving and rehabilitation project for 19th Avenue in San Francisco, to be completed by December 2026

author: Unknown
description: A new long-term parking garage at San Francisco International Airport, featuring 3600 new parking stalls and automated parking guidance technology
